dis_application_view.llm_summary: Karan Nair is a IN national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by MIRAK GLOBAL SERVICES (UK) LTD for Education managers (SOC 2322). The application states salary £51,900 against the SOC going rate £43,900 and start date 2026-07-01. The corpus evidence supports approval: identity, sponsorship, English language, maintenance, TB where required, criminality, and immigration compliance checks are all satisfactory.
